accounts.sleevesText: Grand Sage, Honey Badger, Savage Sage, Value Sage
Grand Sage, Hyper Savage, Savage Sage

diagnostics: Configured account is visible, but no live analytics export has been published yet.

advancedOrderCatalog.summary: Immediate buy or sell through broker-supported market order routing.
Buy at or below a limit price, or sell at or above a limit price.
Trigger a market order when the stop price is reached.
Trigger a limit order when the stop price is reached.
Move the stop with favorable price action, then trigger a market order.
SmartSleeve-supervised trailing stop that submits a limit order when triggered.
Entry order plus linked take-profit and stop-loss exits.
Coordinated exit from one asset and entry into another over an approved window.

regular.fractional_or_notional: regular-hours fractional support is broker/security dependent

etrade.source_note: SmartSleeve E*TRADE adapter policy as currently implemented.

ibkr.source_note: IBKR has richer native order support; SmartSleeve still gates by account permissions, preview, and reconciliation.

guards: Server-side review_equity_order must pass before place_equity_order.
Highly marketable buy limits can be cancelled broker-side; prefer reasonable collars.
Synthetic SmartSleeve order types must be supervised and logged before live placement.
robinhood.source_note: Built from Robinhood support documentation and SmartSleeve broker-adapter constraints; server preview remains authoritative.

source: SmartSleeve analytics exports and report archive
